label: smart lock
scope_note: IN: residential smart locks and garage-door openers (Yale, August, Tinxy, SGUDA, Genie Aladdin, Zigbee lock stacks). OUT: commercial/enterprise access-control panels and building door controllers.

label: smart speaker
scope_note: IN: consumer smart speakers, smart displays, and smart soundbars (Echo, Nest, HomePod) — qualify as home-control surfaces via criterion 4(b). OUT: plain Bluetooth speakers, headphones, and AV receivers with no assistant/home-control role.

label: sleep tracker
scope_note: IN: bedside / non-wearable sleep monitors. OUT: wrist wearables and fitness trackers (Fitbit, Apple Watch, Garmin).

label: video doorbell
scope_note: IN: video/smart doorbells (Ring, Reolink, Foscam VD, Akuvox). OUT: standalone cameras (classify under cameras) and baby monitors (under babymonitor).

label: smart thermostat
scope_note: IN: residential smart thermostats. OUT: commercial building-management/HVAC controllers and industrial climate systems.

label: baby monitor
scope_note: IN: dedicated consumer baby monitors. OUT: generic IP cameras not sold as baby monitors (classify under cameras) and any enterprise surveillance gear.

label: smart plug
scope_note: IN: consumer smart plugs, outlets, and power strips. OUT: enterprise/data-center PDUs and industrial power management.

label: home alarm
scope_note: IN: consumer home security/alarm systems and their sensors (eufy/Anker HomeBase, Qolsys, Abode, Nexx). OUT: commercial/industrial alarm, fire, and building-monitoring panels.

label: robot vacuum
scope_note: IN: consumer robot vacuums and mops. OUT: industrial/commercial cleaning robots.

label: smart fan
scope_note: IN: consumer smart/connected fans (ceiling, tower, pedestal). OUT: industrial/commercial ventilation and exhaust systems.

label: smart refrigerator
scope_note: IN: consumer smart refrigerators. OUT: commercial/industrial refrigeration.

label: smart blinds
scope_note: IN: consumer smart blinds, shades, curtains, shutters and their motors/controllers. OUT: commercial/industrial window and facade systems.

label: home sensor
scope_note: IN: consumer home sensors — motion, contact, leak, temperature, air-quality, presence. OUT: industrial/enterprise sensors and PLC/SCADA field devices.

label: air purifier
scope_note: IN: consumer smart air purifiers. OUT: commercial/industrial air-handling and filtration systems.

label: smart lighting
scope_note: IN: consumer smart bulbs, light/dimmer/wall switches, and LED controllers (Hue, LIFX). OUT: phone 'Smart Switch' data-migration software, network switches, and apps/plugins that merely reference lighting.

label: smart appliance
scope_note: IN: consumer smart kitchen/laundry appliances — oven, range, cooker, microwave, dishwasher, washer, dryer, water heater. OUT: commercial/industrial appliances.

label: smart home hub
scope_note: IN: IoT hubs, bridges, and Matter/Thread/Zigbee/Z-Wave controllers (SmartThings, Hubitat, Hue Bridge). OUT: plain routers, modems, ONT, and unmanaged switches — transport, not home control.

label: EV home charger
scope_note: IN: home EVSE/wallbox for a private garage or driveway. OUT: commercial/public/fleet chargers (Iocharger, Circontrol, Raption, eCharge) and the vehicle itself.

label: home energy system
scope_note: IN: residential solar inverters, home batteries, and smart meters (SMA, Victron Venus, Enphase, Tesla Powerwall). OUT: utility-scale/commercial PV and grid equipment.

label: smart garden
scope_note: IN: consumer irrigation controllers and robot mowers (RainMachine, Rachio, ECOVACS/Yarbo mowers). OUT: commercial/agricultural irrigation and turf equipment.

label: smart pet device
scope_note: IN: consumer smart pet feeders, pet cameras, and litter boxes. OUT: commercial/veterinary/livestock equipment.

label: streaming device
scope_note: IN: streaming TVs, sticks, and boxes (Google/Android TV, Fire TV, Apple TV, Roku) — qualify as home-control surfaces via criterion 4(b); Apple TV named in a shared-codebase iOS/tvOS CVE counts. OUT: game consoles, VR/AR headsets, and pure media apps.

label: smart air conditioner
scope_note: IN: consumer smart/Wi-Fi air conditioners and mini-splits with app control. OUT: commercial rooftop units and industrial HVAC.

label: security camera
scope_note: IN: consumer IP/Wi-Fi/battery security cameras and home DVR/NVR. OUT: enterprise NVR/VMS/SAN and cloud gateways (Hikvision Hybrid SAN, Dahua DSS, Pelco professional, wireless bridges). Video doorbells belong to doorbell; baby monitors to babymonitor.
